Name: SPELL_SOUL_CONSUME_PARAM
Description: Defines soul consumption behavior for spells, including cost calculation type and associated bullet/damage mappings for both right and left-hand casting.

Fields.Name: Calculation Type
Fields.Description: Defines the formula or method used to calculate soul consumption.

Fields.Name: Soul Cost
Fields.Description: Base amount of souls consumed when casting the spell.

Fields.Name: Bullet & Damage ID 1
Fields.Description: Reference pair linking bullet and damage behavior for configuration slot 1.

Fields.Name: Bullet & Damage ID 2
Fields.Description: Reference pair linking bullet and damage behavior for configuration slot 2.

Fields.Name: Bullet & Damage ID 3
Fields.Description: Reference pair linking bullet and damage behavior for configuration slot 3.

Fields.Name: Bullet & Damage ID 4
Fields.Description: Reference pair linking bullet and damage behavior for configuration slot 4.

Fields.Name: Bullet & Damage ID 5
Fields.Description: Reference pair linking bullet and damage behavior for configuration slot 5.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Bullet & Damage ID 1
Fields.Description: Left-hand casting configuration linking bullet and damage behavior for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Bullet & Damage ID 2
Fields.Description: Left-hand casting configuration linking bullet and damage behavior for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Bullet & Damage ID 3
Fields.Description: Left-hand casting configuration linking bullet and damage behavior for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Bullet & Damage ID 4
Fields.Description: Left-hand casting configuration linking bullet and damage behavior for slot 4.

Fields.Name: Left-Hand Bullet & Damage ID 5
Fields.Description: Left-hand casting configuration linking bullet and damage behavior for slot 5.
